g.text: STEP 1: UNOPTIMIZED LOGICAL PLAN (Late Predicate Evaluation)

ul.li: Bottleneck: The Join operator processes 1,000,000 rows from both relations.
Resource Usage: High memory for Join Hash Table (1M entries).
Inefficiency: Non-Icelandic users are joined and then immediately discarded by the Filter.
Pushdown Rule: Filter moved below Join based on attribute ownership (users.country).
Cardinality Reduction: Input to Join reduced from 1M to 1,000 rows.
Performance Gain: 99.9% reduction in join complexity and memory buffer.
